title: Shortened Swords
description: Tired of low visibility while holding your sword in PVP? This resource pack is made to fix this!!! Works only in Minecraft 1.8 or 1.7.
body:
WHAT DOES THIS RESOURCE PACK DO?
- This resource pack makes swords shorter so you have more visibility whilst holding it.

WHY SHOULD YOU DOWNLOAD THIS RESOURCE PACK?
- Visibility is actually an important part in Minecraft 1.8 PVP so I hope that this resource pack helps you out in PVP!!!

DOES IT WORK IN MINECRAFT 1.7?
- I think so but I hadn't personally tested it myself...

CAN YOU USE IT IN A MODPACK?
- Sure why not!!! You can do it as long as you give the name of the modpack in the description or credit me in the modpack.
